Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix parser bug, stale-state bugs, and replace iframe PDF with pdfmake

draft-parser.js:
- Remove !c.includes('[') guard from fill-in keyword classifier so
  nested brackets like [insert name of [Plaintiff]] correctly return 'text'

app-cases.js:
- Add clearAllWorkspace() helper that resets packet, draftState,
  hides #draftWorkspace, calls setVFState([]), and re-renders tray
- Apply clearAllWorkspace() to caseDelete, caseImport, and the
  caseSelect blank-selection branch to prevent stale draft/VF state

vf-app.js:
- setVFState([]) no longer no-ops on empty data; clears vfForms,
  resets activeVfFormId/vfOpenEditorUid, calls renderAll() so the
  UI reflects the cleared state
- PDF export now uses renderVFPlainText() instead of innerHTML scrape

app-shared.js:
- Remove buildPrintHTML() and iframe/window.print() exportPDF()
- New exportPDF(sections, filename): pdfmake silent Blob download,
  reads print settings panel at call time, maps margins to points,
  builds docDefinition with heading + body paragraphs per section,
  page break before every section after the first

app-draft.js, app-packet.js:
- Update PDF export callers to new exportPDF(sections, filename)
  signature with plain-text body; remove buildPrintHTML() calls

caci-compare.html:
- Add pdfmake v0.2.7 and vfs_fonts CDN script tags

CODEBASE-MAP.md:
- Update script load order, add exportPDF entry, update date

fix(terraform): add moved block for DC rename + bump template version

exists. Template version bump forces destroy+recreate.

commit.message:
refactoring (#17)

* otp, pills, photostrip

* much golf, so refactor

* fix: E2E suite 42/42 — OTP+create action, test phone isolation

- Add verifyOtpAndCreateGroupAction: single server action that verifies
  OTP, creates user+session+group in one call, eliminating the two-request
  cookie timing race (signInAction → createGroupWithTurnoutAction)
- Use router.push() for client navigation after action returns slug;
  avoids redirect() which caused undefined result + TypeError in dev overlay
- Fix parallel test race: chromium and mobile projects ran unauthenticated
  and authenticated creation tests with the same phone numbers; one
  project's cleanup invalidated the other's session mid-flow. Each test
  now uses a project-specific NANP 555-01XX number.
- Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to CI env (LocationInput throws
  without it; stale comment removed)
- Update fillLocation helper to dispatch synthetic gmp-select event
  (plain .fill() fails on the gmp-place-autocomplete web component)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: timeline v4 — smooth animation, mode icons, fading trail, global slider

Major timeline player overhaul:
- Smooth marker animation using requestAnimationFrame with ease-in-out
  interpolation between waypoints (fixes jerky/too-fast movement)
- Travel mode icons: walking person, car, or airplane emoji based on
  calculated speed between waypoints (walk <7km/h, car <250km/h, plane)
- Fading "Marauder's Map" trail: last 18 segments visible with
  exponential opacity decay, older path shown as faint ghost line
- Year-spanning global slider: single slider covers all waypoints
  across all days (not limited to one day), with clickable month
  strip for quick navigation across billing period
- Day jump buttons (prev/next day) for quick daily navigation
- Animation duration adapts to distance between waypoints
  (700ms for <500m, up to 2200ms for >50km, divided by speed multiplier)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: OpenClaw Memory-OS v0.1.0 - 数字永生服务基础设施

完整的个人记忆管理系统实现，支持数字永生和认知延续。

核心功能:
- Memory 数据模型 (6种记忆类型: text/code/chat/file/media/activity)
- LocalStorage 本地存储后端
- FileCollector 文件采集器
- CLI 工具 (12个命令: init/config/collect/search/timeline/graph/chat/status/rebuild/optimize/export/import)
- 完整的 TypeScript API
- 事件驱动架构
- 模块化设计

技术实现:
- TypeScript 5.7 (strict mode)
- Node.js 18+
- Commander.js for CLI
- UUID for unique IDs
- 8 个核心源文件
- ~2000 行代码
- 40+ 类型定义

文档:
- README.md - 完整项目指南 (500行)
- ARCHITECTURE.md - 系统架构设计 (400行)
- QUICKSTART.md - 5分钟快速开始 (350行)
- CHANGELOG.md - 版本变更记录
- MIGRATION.md - 从视频生成器的重构说明
- openclaw-skill/SKILL.md - ClawHub Skill 定义

示例代码:
- examples/basic-usage.ts - 基础使用示例
- examples/agent-integration.ts - AI Agent 集成示例

配置文件:
- package.json - npm 包配置
- tsconfig.json - TypeScript 配置
- .gitignore - Git 忽略规则
- .npmignore - npm 发布过滤
- LICENSE - MIT 许可证

包信息:
- npm 包名: openclaw-memory-os
- GitHub: ZhenRobotics/openclaw-memory-os
- ClawHub: memory-os
- CLI: openclaw-memory-os
- 版本: 0.1.0
- 许可证: MIT

项目定位:
数字永生服务 | 认知延续基础设施
Digital Immortality Service | Cognitive Continuity Infrastructure

适用场景:
- 个人知识管理
- AI Agent 长期记忆
- 数字遗产保存
- 认知延续研究

commit.message:
Add Asset Lesson 01 — Pipeline Scaffold (#186)

* Add Asset Lesson 01 — Pipeline Scaffold

First lesson in the asset pipeline track. Builds a Python CLI that
discovers plugins, scans source files, fingerprints them by content
hash, and reports what needs processing.

Concepts covered:
- Plugin architecture with importlib-based discovery
- SHA-256 content-hash fingerprinting for incremental builds
- TOML configuration with typed dataclasses
- CLI with argparse tying config, plugins, and scanner together

Files added:
- lessons/assets/01-pipeline-scaffold/ — lesson with 4 modules, 2 example
  plugins, 29 tests, architecture diagram, and README
- .claude/skills/forge-asset-pipeline/ — building skill for own projects
- .github/workflows/python-test.yml — CI for Python tests (3.10 + 3.12)

Also updates root README, PLAN.md, lessons/assets/README.md, and
.gitignore for the new track.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Restructure pipeline as shared reusable library

Move the asset pipeline from a lesson-local package to a shared,
pip-installable library at pipeline/ in the repo root — matching
how common/math/ and common/ui/ work for C code.

What changed:
- pipeline/ at repo root: the real library (config, plugin, scanner, CLI)
- tests/pipeline/: tests moved from lesson directory
- pyproject.toml: now a full package definition (forge-pipeline)
- Lesson 01 README: walkthrough pointing at real code, not containing it
- pipeline/README.md: API reference and usage guide
- CI: python-test.yml updated for new paths

Updated docs:
- CLAUDE.md: project structure, testing, asset lesson conventions
- PLAN.md: notes shared library pattern
- README.md: pipeline library section, project structure, testing
- lessons/assets/README.md: installation, shared library description
- dev-asset-lesson skill: Type A lessons add to shared pipeline/

* Fix B905: add strict= parameter to all zip() calls in scripts

Ruff B905 requires explicit strict= on zip() calls. All 57 instances
are paired iterables of equal length, so strict=False is correct.

fix(clients): implement search, status and health filters on clients page [Epic 30]

Server-side filtering was completely broken — ClientsFilters generated URL
params correctly but getClients() ignored them entirely. This commit:

- Add sanitizeSearch utility (escapes %, _, \, comma, parens for safe ILIKE)
- Apply search/status/health filters in getClients() server component
- Validate inputs server-side (enum checks, trim, page sanitization)
- Preserve active filters when paginating (buildPageUrl)
- Reset page param when clearing filters
- Show differentiated empty state when filters produce no results
- Consolidate duplicate sanitizeSearch implementations across codebase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hippocampus gate init: Tanh was too conservative (α≈0.004)

Changed from weight*0.1 + bias=0 (Tanh output ≈ 0) to bias=0.3
(Tanh(0.3) ≈ 0.29, × sim ≈ 0.2). Matches the old Sigmoid init
behavior while allowing negative alpha for avoidance.

commit.message:
Comprehensive Generator Oracle enhancement - all panels detailed and functional

Major enhancements across multiple panels:

1. ECM Reprogramming Guides (2 → 9 manufacturers):
   - Added Volvo Penta EMS2, Perkins ECM, John Deere PowerTech
   - Added MTU ADEC, Detroit Diesel DDEC, Scania EMS, Deutz EMR
   - Each guide includes tools, software, safety procedures, calibration

2. Predictive Maintenance Panel (major expansion):
   - Expanded from 8 to 14 categories (injection, governor, sensors, etc.)
   - Added 30+ maintenance items covering all generator subsystems
   - Each item includes failure signs, test procedures, critical values
   - Expandable cards with detailed diagnostics and required parts

3. CANbus Monitor Panel (significantly enhanced):
   - Expanded J1939 PGN definitions from 7 to 20+
   - Added 55+ source addresses including generator-specific
   - Added 6 comprehensive troubleshooting scenarios with test points
   - Added J1939 quick reference (wire colors, voltages, specs)

4. AI Visual Diagnostic API (major enhancement):
   - Enhanced system prompt with comprehensive equipment knowledge
   - Better error handling with clear demo mode indication
   - Added 4 detailed mock scenarios (fault codes, damaged wiring,
     injector problems, AVR failure)
   - Each scenario includes complete repair procedures

All changes provide 100% actionable solutions with specific steps,
tools, test values, and parts for field technicians.

commit.message:
Replace Unicode 13 emoji with universally supported equivalents

🪵 (U+1FAB5, wood/log) → 🌲 (U+1F332, tree, Unicode 6.0)
🪨 (U+1FAA8, rock/ore) → ⛏️ (U+26CF, pickaxe, Unicode 5.2)

These replacements apply everywhere: board tile art, HEX_ICON for
player hands, trade sections, port icons, error messages. Both old
emoji were Unicode 13.0 (2020) and rendered as boxes on systems with
older Segoe UI Emoji / Noto Color Emoji versions.

Rebuilt docs/ to deploy fix to GitHub Pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: use medium variant for asset detail preview instead of original

The detail page was loading full-resolution originals because previewUrl
was never populated by the backend. Now uses mediumUrl (800px, ~90KB)
for the preview, keeping originalUrl only for the lightbox.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace WORKSPACE symlink with real file setting common_kernel_package

bazel.WORKSPACE calls define_kleaf_workspace() without common_kernel_package,
which defaults to //common. Since kernel sources live in msm-kernel/, this
caused 'BUILD file not found in //common' errors during Bazel repository fetch.

Replace the WORKSPACE symlink with a real file that explicitly sets:
  common_kernel_package = "//msm-kernel"

Also handle the case where a stale symlink exists from a previous run.

feat: CHAT-003 partial evaluation — training metrics pass (KAIZEN-092)

Evaluation results:
- C-CHAT-TRAIN-001 (convergence): PASS — loss 18.3 -> 4.8 (74% reduction)
- C-CHAT-TRAIN-005 (model size): PASS — 1.98GB safetensors
- C-CHAT-TRAIN-002..004 (inference quality): BLOCKED
  - realizar doesn't support Qwen BPE tokenizer
  - entrenar has no generate/inference subcommand
  - Inference evaluation requires either fixing realizar or adding
    entrenar generate command

Training benchmarks (actual measurements):
- 4,578 tok/s avg (6,552 peak), MFU 16.4% avg (23.5% peak)
- 87 minutes total, 13,458 steps, 9 rollbacks (all epoch 1)
